items.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials found that combined biopsychosocial interventions are effective in reducing pain and functional disability in adults with chronic low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 生物心理社会干预已被本综述坐实对慢性腰痛有显著疗效。这巩固了这类多模式干预在临床实践中的一线地位，下次跟患者沟通时要强调其全面性。
items.titleZh: 生物心理社会联合干预对慢性腰痛的疗效：一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，生物心理社会联合干预能有效减轻慢性腰痛成年患者的疼痛和功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review confirms that biopsychosocial interventions are significantly effective for chronic low back pain. This solidifies their first-line status in clinical practice, and you should emphasize their comprehensive nature when discussing with patients.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告具体的效应量和异质性数据。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report specific effect sizes and heterogeneity data.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials

items.title: Validity and reliability of on‑site and off‑site direct observation of procedural skills (DOPS) for knee mobilization in Physical therapy education.
items.summary: A study evaluated the validity and reliability of the DOPSknee tool for assessing knee joint mobilization skills in 42 preclinical physical therapy students, finding good on-site inter-rater reliability.
items.curatedReason: DOPSknee 工具的有效性和可靠性数据出炉，为膝关节松动术的教学与评估提供了标准化工具。这有助于确保学生在临床前阶段就掌握扎实的核心技能，并能在远程教学中保持评估质量。
items.titleZh: 膝关节松动术程序技能直接观察（DOPS）工具在物理治疗教育中现场及异地应用的效度和信度
items.summaryZh: 一项研究评估了 DOPSknee 工具在 42 名临床前物理治疗学生中评估膝关节松动术技能的效度和信度，结果显示现场评估的评价者间信度良好。
items.curatedReasonEn: The DOPSknee tool's validity and reliability data are now available, offering a standardized instrument for teaching and assessing knee joint mobilization. This helps ensure students acquire solid core skills in preclinical stages and maintains assessment quality in off-site settings.
items.limitation: 研究样本量为 42 名学生，可能影响结果的外推性。
items.limitationEn: The study sample size was 42 students, which may affect the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summary: This two-arm multi-site randomized external feasibility trial explored the TRAK MSK digital physiotherapy self-management program for musculoskeletal pain, delivered over 16 weeks to adults with activity-related joint pain, comparing it to usual NHS physiotherapy care.
items.curatedReason: 此 RCT 旨在评估一项数字物理治疗项目的可行性，而非疗效。在招募与交付方面显示出潜力，提示了未来方向，但切勿因此改变目前的临床实践。
items.titleZh: TRAK MSK：一项数字物理治疗支持的肌肉骨骼疼痛自我管理项目的随机外部可行性试验和过程评估
items.summaryZh: 这项两臂多中心随机外部可行性试验，评估了针对肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗支持自我管理项目 TRAK MSK 的可行性，该项目持续 16 周，并与常规 NHS 物理治疗护理进行比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is an important feasibility study, paving the way for larger digital physiotherapy intervention trials by demonstrating potential in recruitment and delivery. The results are noteworthy, but not yet practice-changing evidence.
items.limitation: 这是一项可行性研究，旨在评估试验流程而非干预效果，样本量和随访期有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a feasibility study, assessing trial processes rather than intervention efficacy, with limited sample size and follow-up.
items.journal: BMC musculoskeletal disorders

items.title: Professional reintegration after stroke: experiences of Portuguese stroke survivors.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study, based on a questionnaire completed by 1,175 Portuguese stroke survivors 18-24 months post-stroke, explored their experiences with professional reintegration, focusing on perceived consequences, barriers, and enablers for return to work.
items.curatedReason: 此观察研究提示了影响卒中后患者重返工作岗位的关键因素。临床上，应关注这些障碍和促进因素，以更好地支持患者的职业康复。
items.titleZh: 中风后职业再融入：葡萄牙中风幸存者的经历
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性队列研究基于 1,175 名葡萄牙中风幸存者在发病后 18-24 个月完成的问卷，探讨了他们重返工作岗位的经历，重点关注了感知到的后果、障碍和促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests key factors influencing return to work for stroke survivors. Clinically, focus on these barriers and enablers to better support vocational rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究为回顾性队列设计，可能存在回忆偏倚和未控制的混杂因素，且仅限于葡萄牙人群，外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study is a retrospective cohort design, potentially subject to recall bias and unmeasured confounders, and limited to the Portuguese population, restricting generalizability.
items.journal: Topics in stroke rehabilitation

items.title: Incomplete Cognitive Assessment in Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation: Recovering Clinically Interpretable Relationships from Routine Neuropsychological Data.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study of 2654 post-acute stroke patients demonstrated that incomplete routine neuropsychological assessment data can still yield clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables, supporting group-level stratification.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，即使在数据不完整的情况下，常规神经心理学评估数据仍能为中风后认知功能提供有临床意义的见解。这提示你，不必因数据不全而放弃分析，可以从中提取模式来优化康复策略。
items.titleZh: 急性期后中风康复中不完整的认知评估：从常规神经心理学数据中恢复临床可解释的关系
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 2654 名急性期后中风患者的回顾性队列研究表明，即使是不完整的常规神经心理学评估数据，仍能揭示认知、临床和背景变量之间具有临床可解释的关系，并支持群体分层。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that routine neuropsychological assessment data can still provide clinically interpretable insights into post-stroke cognitive function, even with incomplete data. This suggests that you don't need to abandon analysis due to incomplete data and can extract patterns to optimize rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 回顾性队列研究，数据来自单一中心，可能存在选择偏倚，且认知评估并非标准化设计。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective cohort study, data from a single center, potentially subject to selection bias, and cognitive assessments were not standardly designed.
items.journal: NeuroRehabilitation

items.title: "If you don't sort out these problems, you end up building problems": a qualitative study exploring mouthcare at home with people with Parkinson's and their partners in care.
items.summary: This qualitative study, based on semi-structured interviews with 13 people with Parkinson's (PwP) and 7 partners in care, explored their experiences with performing mouthcare activities at home, identifying motor and non-motor barriers.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了帕金森病患者及其照护伙伴在家庭口腔护理方面的具体困难，这提醒你在评估帕金森患者的日常功能时，应考虑口腔护理这个常被忽视的方面。
items.titleZh: “如果你不解决这些问题，最终就会积累出问题”：一项关于帕金森病患者及其照护伙伴居家口腔护理经历的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究通过对 13 名帕金森病患者和 7 名照护伙伴进行半结构化访谈，探讨了他们在居家口腔护理活动中的经历，并识别出运动和非运动障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals specific difficulties Parkinson's patients and their care partners face with home mouthcare. This reminds you to consider this often-overlooked aspect when assessing daily function in Parkinson's patients.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小（13 名患者，7 名照护者），结果的普遍性有限，主要依赖参与者自我报告。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size (13 patients, 7 caregivers), limiting generalizability of findings, and relying primarily on self-report.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: Comparative efficacy of different joint mobilization techniques in shoulder adhesive capsulitis: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis found no significant differences in objective and subjective outcomes among various non-thrust joint mobilization techniques for shoulder adhesive capsulitis, suggesting comparable short-term clinical effects.
items.curatedReason: 肩关节囊炎的非冲击性关节松动术，不同技术间疗效差异不大。下次选择手法时，你可以优先考虑患者依从性和操作便利性，而非执着于特定技术。但要提醒患者这只改善短期功能。
items.titleZh: 不同关节松动技术对肩关节囊炎的比较疗效：随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对肩关节囊炎的系统综述和荟萃分析显示，各种非冲击性关节松动技术在改善客观和主观结局方面无显著差异，提示短期临床疗效相似。
items.curatedReasonEn: For shoulder adhesive capsulitis, non-thrust joint mobilization techniques show similar efficacy. When choosing a technique, prioritize patient compliance and ease of application over a specific method. However, advise patients that benefits are primarily short-term.
items.limitation: 本系统综述和荟萃分析仅评估了非冲击性关节松动术的短期效应，长期疗效尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis only evaluated the short-term effects of non-thrust joint mobilization, with long-term efficacy remaining unclear.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: [Correspondence] From targets to minutes: making movement advice actionable
items.summary: This correspondence suggests shifting physical activity messaging from aspirational thresholds to achievable marginal gains, showing that small increases in activity among the least active can yield the greatest population benefit, aligning with WHO guidance.
items.curatedReason: 这项通讯支持将运动建议从“目标”转变为“分钟数”，强调即使是少量增量运动也能带来显著的群体健康益处。在临床咨询中，你可以用这个视角鼓励久坐患者，突出小步快跑的价值，而不是宏大的活动量目标。
items.titleZh: 从目标到分钟：让运动建议更具可操作性
items.summaryZh: 这篇通讯提出，将运动量建议从理想阈值转变为可实现的边际增益，表明即使是活动量最少的人群，小幅度的活动增加也能带来最大的群体效益，与世卫组织指南相符。
items.curatedReasonEn: This correspondence supports shifting physical activity advice from 'targets' to 'minutes,' highlighting that even small incremental movements can yield significant population health benefits. In clinical consultations, you can use this perspective to encourage sedentary patients, emphasizing the value of small, achievable gains over ambitious activity goals.
items.limitation: 本研究为通讯，未提供原始研究设计和数据，且结论依赖于此前已发表的文章，可能存在二次解读的局限性。
items.limitationEn: This correspondence does not provide original study design or data, and its conclusions rely on previously published articles, potentially limiting secondary interpretation.
items.journal: The Lancet

items.title: Applications of ICF-Based Assessments and Interventions in Post-Stroke Rehabilitation: A Narrative Review.
items.summary: This narrative review found that ICF-based assessments and interventions are widely applicable in post-stroke rehabilitation, with 546 assessments mapped to the ICF across 166 studies, covering over 80% of UK Stroke Guideline topics, though primarily focused on Body Function.
items.curatedReason: 国际功能、残疾和健康分类（ICF）在卒中康复中的应用潜力巨大，尤其是可以与现有指南（如英国卒中指南）对标。你在临床实践中评估卒中患者时，应更全面地将ICF框架融入康复评估和目标设定，超越单一身体功能维度。
items.titleZh: ICF 评估和干预在卒中后康复中的应用：叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 这项叙述性综述发现，基于 ICF 的评估和干预在卒中后康复中应用广泛，166 项研究中的 546 种评估可映射到 ICF，覆盖了 80% 以上的英国卒中指南主题，但主要集中在身体功能层面。
items.curatedReasonEn: The International Classification of Functioning, Disability and Health (ICF) holds significant potential in stroke rehabilitation, especially in alignment with existing guidelines like the UK Stroke Guideline. In clinical practice, you should integrate the ICF framework more comprehensively into stroke assessment and goal setting, moving beyond isolated body function dimensions.
items.limitation: 本研究为叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，且缺乏对不同干预措施有效性的定量评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a narrative review, which may be subject to selection bias and lacks quantitative assessment of intervention effectiveness.
items.journal: NeuroRehabilitation

items.title: Real-World Outcomes of a Telephone-Based Virtual Cognitive Rehabilitation Therapy Program: A Retrospective Cohort Analysis
items.summary: A retrospective cohort analysis of 141 older adults (mean age 71.2) found that a telephone-based virtual cognitive rehabilitation program, combining SLP-led sessions with automated cognitive exercises, improved daily functioning in individuals with mild cognitive impairment (61.7%) and early-stage dementia (29.1%).
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究显示，电话虚拟认知康复项目对于轻度认知障碍和早期痴呆患者是有效的，能够改善日常功能。当你面对受地理限制或交通不便的患者时，可以考虑推荐这类虚拟康复方案，作为传统面诊的补充或替代。
items.titleZh: 电话虚拟认知康复治疗项目的真实世界结果：一项回顾性队列分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 141 名老年患者（平均年龄 71.2 岁）的回顾性队列分析显示，结合言语治疗师主导会话和自动化认知练习的电话虚拟认知康复项目，改善了轻度认知障碍（61.7%）和早期痴呆（29.1%）患者的日常功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study shows that telephone-based virtual cognitive rehabilitation programs are effective for individuals with mild cognitive impairment and early-stage dementia, improving daily functioning. When faced with patients limited by geography or transportation, you might consider recommending such virtual rehabilitation options as a complement or alternative to traditional in-person visits.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性观察分析，存在固有的选择偏倚和混杂因素，且缺乏对照组，无法排除其他因素的影响。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective observational analysis has inherent selection bias and confounding factors, and the lack of a control group prevents ruling out other influences.

items.title: Development and Preliminary Clinical Feasibility of a Wearable Nanovibration Delivery Device for Localised Bone Stimulation in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: Researchers developed and evaluated a wearable device for localized nanovibration delivery (1 kHz) at the distal femur in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI), demonstrating its preliminary clinical feasibility as a potential intervention for SCI-related bone loss.
items.curatedReason: 这项设备初步可行性研究提示，可穿戴纳米振动设备有望成为脊髓损伤患者局部骨刺激的新干预手段。虽然仍处于早期阶段，但这种非侵入性技术未来可能用于预防脊髓损伤后的下肢骨质流失。你可以关注后续的人体临床试验进展。
items.titleZh: 用于脊髓损伤患者局部骨刺激的可穿戴纳米振动递送设备的开发和初步临床可行性
items.summaryZh: 研究人员开发并评估了一种可穿戴设备，用于对脊髓损伤患者的股骨远端进行局部纳米振动（1 kHz）递送，初步证实了其临床可行性，有望成为脊髓损伤相关骨质流失的潜在干预手段。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preliminary feasibility study suggests that wearable nanovibration devices could be a new intervention for localized bone stimulation in individuals with spinal cord injury. While still in early stages, this non-invasive technology might prevent lower limb bone loss post-SCI in the future. You should follow subsequent human clinical trial developments.
items.limitation: 本研究仅评估了设备开发和初步临床可行性，尚未涉及其对骨质流失的实际疗效，且样本量非常小，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This study only evaluated device development and preliminary clinical feasibility, not actual efficacy on bone loss, and the very small sample size limits generalizability.

items.title: Examination and treatment of the spine for upper extremity pain: a case series.
items.summary: This case series describes three patients with upper extremity pain who showed clinically significant improvements in self-reported disability after receiving spine mobilization or manipulation techniques, even when symptoms did not align with typical pain referral patterns.
items.curatedReason: 这组病例报告提示，对于常规评估中找不到明确上肢疼痛来源的患者，可以考虑检查和处理脊柱。但请记住，这只是小样本的观察，不能推广为普适性策略。
items.titleZh: 对脊柱进行检查和治疗以缓解上肢疼痛：一个病例系列
items.summaryZh: 本病例系列描述了三名上肢疼痛患者，在接受脊柱松动或手法治疗后，自我报告残疾方面获得了显著临床改善，即便症状不符合典型疼痛传导模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case series suggests considering spinal examination and treatment for patients with upper extremity pain where a clear source isn't found in routine assessment. However, this is a small observational study, so avoid generalizing it as a universal strategy.
items.limitation: 本研究为病例系列，证据等级较低，无法确定脊柱干预与上肢疼痛改善的因果关系，且样本量过小，外推性差。
items.limitationEn: This case series has a low evidence level, precluding causal inference between spinal intervention and upper extremity pain improvement. The small sample size also limits generalizability.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Distinct Patterns of Mobility Recovery After Stroke Using Routine Clinical Data
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 750 stroke patients identified distinct mobility recovery trajectories during the first 180 days using Activity Measure for Post-Acute Care (AM-PAC) Basic Mobility data, improving prognostication.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究通过识别卒中后不同的移动能力恢复轨迹，为临床预后判断和个体化康复策略制定提供了更精细的视角。这将帮助你更好地评估患者潜力并调整干预方案。
items.titleZh: 利用常规临床数据识别卒中后移动能力恢复的不同模式
items.summaryZh: 一项对750名卒中患者的回顾性队列研究，利用急性后期活动评估量表（AM-PAC）基本移动能力数据，识别了卒中后180天内不同的移动能力恢复轨迹，从而提升了预后判断。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study of 750 stroke patients suggests distinct mobility recovery trajectories exist within 180 days post-stroke. Understanding these trajectories can help you refine patient prognostication and tailor rehabilitation strategies, but remember this is still observational evidence.
items.limitation: 作为回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素，且结果基于特定健康系统的数据，外推性需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, confounding factors may exist, and the results are based on data from a specific health system, so generalizability requires caution.

items.title: Cross-education via contralateral-limb balance training improves gait speed and sagittal-plane knee motion after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=40) showed that contralateral-limb balance training combined with conventional rehabilitation improved gait speed and sagittal-plane knee motion after ACL reconstruction compared to conventional rehabilitation alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT研究证明了交叉教育结合对侧肢体平衡训练能显著改善前交叉韧带重建术后的步速和膝关节矢状面运动。在ACL术后早期康复中，你应该考虑将这种方法纳入训练方案，尤其是在患侧负重受限的情况下。
items.titleZh: 对侧肢体平衡训练的交叉教育效应可改善前交叉韧带重建术后的步速和膝关节矢状面运动：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=40）显示，对侧肢体平衡训练结合常规康复治疗，相比单纯常规康复，能改善前交叉韧带重建术后的步速和膝关节矢状面运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT demonstrates that cross-education combined with contralateral-limb balance training significantly improves gait speed and sagittal-plane knee motion after ACL reconstruction. You should consider incorporating this approach into early ACL rehab, especially when ipsilateral weight-bearing is restricted.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小（40例），且随访期仅6周，需更长期、大样本研究验证其持续效果。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (40 patients) and a follow-up period of only 6 weeks; longer-term, larger studies are needed to confirm sustained effects.

items.title: Pelvic floor muscle training for pelvic organ prolapse: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials investigated the effectiveness of pelvic floor muscle training (PFMT) for pelvic organ prolapse (POP).
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和Meta分析证实了盆底肌训练（PFMT）对盆腔脏器脱垂（POP）的有效性。你应该在临床中，将PFMT作为POP患者保守治疗的一线选择，并据此调整你的宣教和训练方案。
items.titleZh: 盆底肌训练治疗盆腔脏器脱垂：一项随机对照试验的系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的系统综述和Meta分析，探讨了盆底肌训练（PFMT）治疗盆腔脏器脱垂（POP）的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the effectiveness of pelvic floor muscle training (PFMT) for pelvic organ prolapse (POP). You should integrate PFMT as a first-line conservative treatment for POP patients in your clinical practice, adjusting your education and training protocols accordingly.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告纳入RCT的异质性和质量等级，可能影响结论的稳健性。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report the heterogeneity and quality grades of the included RCTs, which may affect the robustness of the conclusions.

items.title: Effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia: a systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和贝叶斯网络Meta分析评估了卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍的非药物干预措施。它能帮助你全面了解不同干预方案的相对效果，为临床决策提供高级别证据支持，从而优化患者的下肢康复策略。
items.titleZh: 卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍非药物干预的有效性：一项系统综述和贝叶斯网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和贝叶斯网络Meta分析评估了卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍非药物干预措施的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This high-level systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis provides a comprehensive ranking of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia. You can directly use its evidence hierarchy to optimize your clinical decision-making and rehabilitation program design.
items.limitation: 贝叶斯网络Meta分析的结论质量取决于纳入研究的异质性和原始研究的方法学质量，可能存在潜在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The quality of conclusions from Bayesian network meta-analysis depends on the heterogeneity and methodological quality of included studies, with potential for bias.

items.title: Immediate Weight-Bearing and Early Ambulation Rehabilitation After Femoral Neck System Fixation for Undisplaced Femoral Neck Fractures: A Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A prospective randomized controlled trial found immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation rehabilitation after femoral neck system fixation for undisplaced femoral neck fractures to be effective.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性RCT发现，股骨颈系统内固定治疗无移位股骨颈骨折后，立即负重和早期活动是安全有效的。这基本坐实了早期康复策略的可行性，你应该积极推进此类患者的早期活动，以优化功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 无移位股骨颈骨折股骨颈系统内固定术后立即负重和早期活动康复：一项前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性随机对照试验发现，无移位股骨颈骨折在股骨颈系统内固定术后立即负重和早期活动康复是有效的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective RCT found that immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation after femoral neck system fixation for undisplaced femoral neck fractures are safe and effective. This solidifies the feasibility of early rehabilitation strategies, and you should actively promote early mobilization in these patients to optimize functional recovery.
items.limitation: 研究可能存在样本量和随访时间上的局限，可能需要更长期的随访来确认远期效果。
items.limitationEn: The study may have limitations in sample size and follow-up duration, and longer-term follow-up may be needed to confirm long-term effects.

items.title: Prehabilitation Improves Surgical Outcomes in Older Adults Undergoing Spinal Fusion: Study
items.summary: A study suggests that prehabilitation improves surgical outcomes in older adults undergoing spinal fusion surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明术前康复能改善老年脊柱融合术患者的手术结局。这提示你在与外科医生协作时，应积极倡导对老年患者进行术前康复，以优化围手术期管理和患者恢复。
items.titleZh: 研究：术前康复改善老年脊柱融合术患者手术结局
items.summaryZh: 一项研究表明，术前康复能改善老年脊柱融合术患者的手术结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that prehabilitation improves surgical outcomes in older adults undergoing spinal fusion. This suggests that when collaborating with surgeons, you should actively advocate for prehabilitation in elderly patients to optimize perioperative management and patient recovery.
items.limitation: 新闻来源未提供具体研究设计细节，无法评估其证据等级和具体局限。
items.limitationEn: The news source did not provide specific study design details, making it impossible to assess its level of evidence and specific limitations.

items.title: Effects of a 4-week neuromuscular balance training program on knee proprioception, functional performance, and landing errors in national-level female wrestlers: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A 4-week neuromuscular balance training program improved knee proprioception, functional performance, and reduced landing errors in 22 national-level female wrestlers in a randomized controlled trial.
items.titleZh: 4周神经肌肉平衡训练对国家级女子摔跤运动员膝关节本体感觉、功能表现和落地错误的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，为期4周的神经肌肉平衡训练项目改善了22名国家级女子摔跤运动员的膝关节本体感觉、功能表现，并减少了落地错误。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that a short-term (4-week) neuromuscular balance training program can improve knee proprioception, functional performance, and landing errors in national-level female wrestlers. For high-level athletes, consider incorporating this intervention into training plans to reduce lower extremity injury risk.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小（22名摔跤运动员），结果外推至其他人群或长期效果需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (22 wrestlers), and results should be generalized to other populations or long-term effects with caution.

items.title: Acute effects of aerobic versus combined aerobic and cervical-upper extremity resistance exercise on pressure pain threshold, pain perception, and fatigue in workers exposed to high ergonomic risk with chronic non-specific neck pain: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=52) compared the acute effects of aerobic exercise versus combined aerobic and cervical-upper extremity resistance exercise on pressure pain threshold, pain perception, and fatigue in workers with chronic non-specific neck pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入52人的RCT提示，对于慢性非特异性颈痛患者，有氧运动结合颈部/上肢阻力训练可能比单纯有氧运动在急性期提供更好的疼痛缓解效果。在临床实践中，可以考虑将阻力训练纳入你的急性期干预方案。
items.titleZh: 有氧运动与有氧结合颈部-上肢阻力运动对慢性非特异性颈痛高人体工程学风险工人的压力痛阈、疼痛感知和疲劳的急性影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=52）比较了有氧运动与有氧结合颈部-上肢阻力运动对慢性非特异性颈痛且面临高人体工程学风险的工人，在压力痛阈、疼痛感知和疲劳方面的急性影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT (n=52) suggests that for chronic non-specific neck pain, combining aerobic exercise with cervical/upper extremity resistance training may offer superior acute pain relief compared to aerobic exercise alone. In clinical practice, consider integrating resistance training into your acute intervention protocols.
items.limitation: 本研究仅评估了急性效应，尚不清楚这些运动模式的长期效果。样本量相对较小（52名参与者）。
items.limitationEn: This study only evaluated acute effects, and the long-term effects of these exercise modalities are unknown. The sample size is relatively small (52 participants).

items.title: Comparative biomechanical strength of autografts for ligament reconstruction: quadriceps, rectus femoris, peroneus longus, patellar, hamstring configurations (quadruple and braided) and iliotibial band: an exploratory cadaveric biomechanical study
items.summary: An exploratory cadaveric biomechanical study compared the strength of various autografts—quadriceps, rectus femoris, peroneus longus, patellar, hamstring configurations, and iliotibial band—for ligament reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 这项尸体研究直接对比了多种自体移植材料在韧带重建中的生物力学强度。这为术后康复提供了宝贵的参考，让你能更精准地匹配康复负荷与移植物的承受能力，避免早期失败。
items.titleZh: 韧带重建自体移植物的生物力学强度比较：股四头肌、股直肌、腓骨长肌、髌腱、襻绳肌（四股和编织）和髂胫束：一项探索性尸体生物力学研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性尸体生物力学研究比较了股四头肌、股直肌、腓骨长肌、髌腱、襻绳肌（四股和编织）和髂胫束等多种自体移植物在韧带重建中的生物力学强度。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cadaveric biomechanical study directly compared the strength of various autografts in ligament reconstruction. Understanding the mechanical properties of different grafts helps you clearly comprehend surgical decisions during discussions with surgeons and adjust postoperative rehabilitation plans to match the graft's load-bearing capacity.
items.limitation: 本研究为尸体研究，其发现可能无法完全复制活体生物力学环境。且仅评估了初始强度，未涉及生物整合和长期负荷能力。
items.limitationEn: This cadaveric study's findings may not fully replicate in vivo biomechanical environments. It also only assessed initial strength, not bio-integration or long-term load capacity.

items.title: The Aspetar Hamstring Injury Rehabilitation Pathway
items.summary: This research report outlines the Aspetar Hamstring Injury Rehabilitation Pathway, offering a structured approach for managing hamstring injuries.

items.titleZh: Aspetar 襻绳肌损伤康复路径
items.summaryZh: 这份研究报告概述了Aspetar襻绳肌损伤康复路径，为管理襻绳肌损伤提供了一个结构化方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This report outlines Aspetar's hamstring injury rehabilitation pathway. It's a practical framework based on expert consensus and clinical experience. You can use it as a reference to review and optimize your own hamstring injury rehabilitation process, especially in guiding return-to-sport phases.
items.limitation: 本研究为机构经验报告，并非随机对照试验，未提供量化的证据等级或效应量。
items.limitationEn: This study is an institutional experience report, not a randomized controlled trial, and does not provide quantified evidence levels or effect sizes.

items.title: Association between low back movement control impairment test results and low back pain - Northern Finland birth cohort study 1966
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 1907 participants from the Northern Finland Birth Cohort 1966 examined the association between low back movement control impairment (MCI) test results and low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项对1907名参与者的横断面研究发现，特定的腰部运动控制障碍（MCI）测试结果与腰痛有关。这意味着在评估腰痛患者时，你应重视MCI的检查，它可能指向一种潜在的治疗靶点。
items.titleZh: 腰部运动控制障碍测试结果与腰痛的关联——1966年芬兰北部出生队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对1966年芬兰北部出生队列1907名参与者的横断面研究，探讨了腰部运动控制障碍（MCI）测试结果与腰痛之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study of 1907 participants found an association between specific low back movement control impairment (MCI) test results and low back pain. This suggests you should prioritize MCI assessment when evaluating patients with low back pain, as it may indicate a potential treatment target.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法确立因果关系。同时，MCI测试的分类可能存在主观性。
items.limitationEn: This study used a cross-sectional design, preventing the establishment of causality. Additionally, the classification of MCI tests may be subjective.

items.title: Weighted total genotype score associated with knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes
items.summary: A retrospective study of 534 Japanese basketball athletes found an association between weighted total genotype score and knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究发现，基因型评分与青少年女性篮球运动员膝关节韧带损伤的发生率相关。虽然基因是不可改变的风险因素，但了解其作用能帮助你更好地识别高危运动员，并在预防策略上提供更个性化的建议，例如更侧重生物力学修正和训练负荷管理。
items.titleZh: 加权总基因型评分与青少年女性篮球运动员膝关节韧带损伤发生率的关联
items.summaryZh: 一项对534名日本篮球运动员的回顾性研究发现，加权总基因型评分与青少年女性篮球运动员膝关节韧带损伤的发生率存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study found that weighted total genotype score is associated with knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes. While genetics are immutable risk factors, understanding their role can help you better identify high-risk athletes and provide more personalized advice on prevention strategies, such as focusing more on biomechanical correction and training load management.
items.limitation: 研究为回顾性设计，无法建立因果关系。基因型得分的临床实用性仍需前瞻性研究验证。
items.limitationEn: The study's retrospective design prevents establishing causality. The clinical utility of genotype scores still requires validation through prospective studies.

items.title: Beyond patient perception: PROMs correlate with objective functional tests following knee cartilage repair
items.summary: An observational study (n=52) found correlations between patient-reported outcome measures (PROMs) and objective functional performance tests at a mean 66.8 months after knee cartilage repair surgery.

items.titleZh: 超越患者感知：患者报告结局与膝关节软骨修复术后客观功能测试相关
items.summaryZh: 一项观察性研究（n=52）发现，在膝关节软骨修复术后平均66.8个月，患者报告结局（PROMs）与客观功能表现测试之间存在相关性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study confirmed a correlation between patient-reported outcome measures (PROMs) and objective functional tests after knee cartilage repair. This supports combining PROMs and objective tests in clinical practice to provide a more comprehensive functional assessment and guide rehabilitation progress.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，仅能揭示相关性，无法确立因果关系。样本量相对较小（52名患者），可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This study is observational, only revealing correlations without establishing causality. The relatively small sample size (52 patients) may affect the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field: a methodological scoping review | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A methodological scoping review identified risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field, noting widespread injuries due to growth, maturation, and escalating training loads, and inconsistent definitions across studies.

items.titleZh: 青少年田径运动肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素：一项方法学范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项方法学范围综述识别了青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素，指出生长、发育和训练负荷增加导致损伤普遍存在，且研究定义不一致。
items.curatedReasonEn: Musculoskeletal injury risk is high in youth track and field athletes, strongly linked to growth, maturation, and escalating training loads. As a therapist, when designing injury prevention programs, you must account for these individual differences, balance training intensity with physical adaptability, and be aware of inconsistent injury definitions across studies.
items.limitation: 这是一项方法学范围综述，主要评估研究方法而非直接提供干预效果，结论可能受限于现有研究质量。
items.limitationEn: This is a methodological scoping review, primarily evaluating research methods rather than directly providing intervention effects, and conclusions may be limited by the quality of existing studies.

related.title: Risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field: a methodological scoping review

items.title: Developmental outcomes in 4-year-old children born in the first COVID-19 lockdown in England: preliminary findings from the Born In COVID Year – Core Lockdown Effects (BICYCLE) study
items.summary: This study presents preliminary findings from the BICYCLE study on developmental outcomes in 4-year-old children born during the first COVID-19 lockdown in England.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了在英格兰首次COVID-19封锁期间出生儿童4岁时的发育结局初步发现。了解这类环境因素对儿童发育的潜在影响，有助于你在评估和干预时考虑更广泛的社会决定因素。
items.titleZh: 英格兰首次COVID-19封锁期间出生儿童4岁时的发育结局：BICYCLE研究的初步发现
items.summaryZh: 本研究展示了BICYCLE研究中，英格兰首次COVID-19封锁期间出生儿童4岁时的发育结局初步发现。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides preliminary findings on developmental outcomes at age 4 for children born during England's first COVID-19 lockdown. Understanding the potential impact of such environmental factors on child development helps you consider broader social determinants during assessment and intervention.
items.limitation: 本研究为初步发现，数据仍在收集中，完整结果和长期影响尚待揭示。
items.limitationEn: This study presents preliminary findings, data collection is ongoing, and full results and long-term impacts are yet to be revealed.

items.title: Effects of physical exercise on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis: A systematic review.
items.summary: A systematic review including RCTs in people with MS (EDSS ≤6.0) found that physical exercise interventions may positively influence spasticity, though specific effects were narratively synthesized.
items.curatedReason: 对于 MS 痉挛的管理，本综述再次确认了物理运动干预的积极作用，尤其强调其非药物性、可及性与多模式潜力。继续将运动疗法作为 MS 痉挛综合管理的核心组成部分。
items.titleZh: 物理运动对多发性硬化症患者痉挛影响的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入了多发性硬化症（MS，EDSS ≤6.0）RCT 的系统综述发现，物理运动干预可能对痉挛有积极影响，但具体效应是叙述性综合的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review reaffirms the positive role of physical exercise interventions in managing MS spasticity, highlighting their non-pharmacological, accessible, and multi-modal potential. Continue to integrate exercise therapy as a core component of comprehensive spasticity management in MS.
items.limitation: 研究设计仅纳入 RCT，但最终结果以叙述性方式综合，未进行 Meta 分析，可能限制了效应量的精确估算。
items.limitationEn: The review included only RCTs, but the results were synthesized narratively without meta-analysis, which may limit precise estimation of effect sizes.
items.journal: Physiotherapy

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: A core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy was developed, categorized into three domains: functioning, participation, and health-related quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 儿科物理治疗的 PRO/PROM 核心集，尤其是首次聚焦于功能、参与和健康相关生活质量，是实践标准化与研究可比性的重要基础。你可以用这套核心指标来指导临床评估和结果测量。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 一项研究开发了儿科物理治疗的九项核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其对应测量（PROMs），分为功能、参与和健康相关生活质量三个领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: This core set of PROs/PROMs for pediatric physical therapy, especially with its focus on function, participation, and health-related quality of life, is a crucial foundation for standardizing practice and enhancing research comparability. Utilize this core set to guide your clinical assessments and outcome measurements.
items.limitation: 本研究主要关注 PRO/PROM 核心集的开发和验证过程，尚未在真实临床环境中评估其推广和采纳情况。
items.limitationEn: This study primarily focused on the development and validation process of the PRO/PROM core set, without evaluating its dissemination and adoption in real clinical settings.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Towards strengthening rehabilitation within health systems: a scoping review of rehabilitation-specific quality indicators
items.summary: A scoping review identified, categorized, and appraised rehabilitation-specific quality indicators (QIs) with generic applicability for evaluating interprofessional rehabilitation care.
items.curatedReason: 此范围综述识别并评估了康复特定的质量指标，为评估多专业康复护理提供了通用标准。这些指标能够帮你更好地进行康复服务质量评估和改进。
items.titleZh: 加强卫生系统内康复：一项康复特定质量指标的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别、分类并评估了具有通用适用性，可用于评估跨专业康复护理的康复特定质量指标（QIs）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review identifies and appraises rehabilitation-specific quality indicators, providing generic standards for evaluating interprofessional rehabilitation care. These indicators can help you better assess and improve the quality of rehabilitation services.
items.limitation: 该范围综述主要基于文献识别现有质量指标，其通用适用性和在不同康复环境中的可操作性仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This scoping review primarily identifies existing quality indicators from literature; their generic applicability and operational feasibility across diverse rehabilitation settings still require further validation.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Balance Stability Characteristics of Patients with Idiopathic Normal Pressure Hydrocephalus
items.summary: An observational study aimed to describe postural control problems in patients with idiopathic normal pressure hydrocephalus (iNPH).
items.curatedReason: 这项研究观察了特发性正常压力性脑积水患者的姿势控制问题，为这类罕见神经系统疾病的步态和平衡障碍评估提供了更多信息。你需要注意这类患者在平衡训练中的特殊需求。
items.titleZh: 特发性正常压力性脑积水患者的平衡稳定性特征
items.summaryZh: 一项观察性研究旨在描述特发性正常压力性脑积水（iNPH）患者的姿势控制问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study observed postural control problems in patients with idiopathic normal pressure hydrocephalus, providing more information for assessing gait and balance disorders in this rare neurological condition. You should pay attention to the specific needs of these patients in balance training.
items.limitation: 这是一项观察性研究，仅观察了患者的姿势控制问题，未能提供干预措施的有效性证据。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study that only observed postural control problems in patients, without providing evidence of intervention effectiveness.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: The Oxford visual perception screen detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors: an early cross-sectional diagnostic accuracy study.
items.summary: The Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) effectively detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute stroke survivors (within 6 weeks), aligning with guidelines for efficient identification.
items.curatedReason: 牛津视知觉筛查量表（OxVPS）是早期卒中患者视知觉障碍的有效诊断工具，其设计遵循指南且易于使用。将其纳入卒中康复初筛流程，能更早发现问题并指导针对性干预。
items.titleZh: 牛津视知觉筛查量表在亚急性卒中患者视知觉障碍中的诊断准确性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性横断面研究表明，牛津视知觉筛查量表（OxVPS）能有效发现亚急性期（6周内）成人卒中幸存者的视知觉困难，为早期诊断提供了高效且符合指南的工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) is an effective and guideline-aligned diagnostic tool for early post-stroke visual perception difficulties. Incorporate it into your initial stroke rehabilitation screening to detect issues sooner and guide targeted interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为早期诊断准确性评估，样本量和随访期有限，长期预测价值尚需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This study is an early-phase diagnostic accuracy evaluation with a limited sample size and follow-up, so long-term predictive value requires further validation.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: Mandatory bundled payments for lower extremity joint replacement (LEJR) under the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) model led to a significant decrease in hospitals providing LEJR prehabilitation services in the US Medicare population, impacting 62,217 beneficiaries.
items.curatedReason: 强制捆绑支付（CJR）模式的实施，导致美国医院在下肢关节置换术前康复（prehabilitation）服务提供上显著减少，这是一个明确的负面信号。你需要留意该政策对你所在机构转诊和康复服务模式的潜在影响。
items.titleZh: 强制捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务提供的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项差分法分析研究发现，在美国实施全面关节置换护理（CJR）强制捆绑支付模式后，医院提供下肢关节置换术前康复服务的比例显著下降，影响了62,217名 Medicare 受益者。
items.curatedReasonEn: The implementation of mandatory bundled payment (CJR) significantly reduced the provision of prehabilitation services for lower extremity joint replacement in US hospitals, a clear negative signal. You need to be aware of the potential impact of this policy on referral patterns and rehabilitation service delivery within your institution.
items.limitation: 本研究基于医保理赔数据，可能无法完全捕捉未报销或自费的康复服务，且未能深入分析服务减少的具体原因。
items.limitationEn: This study relies on Medicare claims data, which may not fully capture unbilled or out-of-pocket rehabilitation services, and did not deeply analyze the specific reasons for service reduction.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 140 TIA/mild stroke patients found that a 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program significantly improved functional exercise capacity, physical activity, and quality-of-life over 6 months compared to usual care.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 明确证实了心血管康复对TIA或轻度卒中患者在6个月内有显著益处，包括改善运动能力、增加体力活动和生活质量。将其纳入这些患者的常规转诊路径。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验对140名短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）或轻度卒中患者进行研究，发现为期6周的心血管康复项目在6个月内显著改善了患者的功能性运动能力、体力活动和生活质量，优于常规护理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT clearly confirms the significant benefits of cardiovascular rehabilitation for TIA or mild stroke patients over 6 months, including improved exercise capacity, physical activity, and quality of life. Incorporate it into the routine referral pathway for these patients.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（140人），且随访期为中等长度（6个月），长期效果和更大人群的普适性尚待验证。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample size is relatively small (140 participants) and the follow-up period is moderate (6 months), so long-term effects and generalizability to a larger population need further validation.
items.journal: Clinical rehabilitation

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) as an emerging noninvasive neuromodulation approach for stroke rehabilitation, with fragmented and methodologically heterogeneous evidence on its benefits.
items.curatedReason: 经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）在卒中康复领域是新兴技术，有潜力，但目前证据尚分散且异质性高。将其视为探索性辅助手段，但尚不宜作为常规方案。
items.titleZh: 经皮脊髓电刺激在卒中康复中的应用：范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述系统梳理了经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）在卒中康复中的现有证据，发现其作为一种新兴的非侵入性神经调节方法，研究设计、刺激参数和结局指标存在较大异质性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) is an emerging, promising technique in stroke rehabilitation, but current evidence is fragmented and highly heterogeneous. Consider it an exploratory adjunct, but it's not yet ready for routine protocols.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，主要局限在于纳入研究的方法学异质性高，难以得出明确的临床推荐。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, the main limitation is the high methodological heterogeneity of included studies, making it difficult to draw definitive clinical recommendations.
items.journal: Topics in stroke rehabilitation

items.title: Multimodal Integration of Gait, Balance, and Infrared Thermography Enhances Machine-Learning Classification of Knee Osteoarthritis: A Cross-Sectional Study
items.summary: This cross-sectional study found that multimodal integration of gait, balance, and infrared thermography data enhanced machine-learning classification of knee osteoarthritis (KOA) compared to single-domain models.
items.curatedReason: 将步态、平衡和红外热成像多模态数据整合到机器学习模型中，能提高膝骨关节炎的诊断分类准确性。这提示你未来在评估 KOA 患者时，可考虑结合多维度的生物力学和生理指标，以实现更精准的诊断和治疗分层。
items.titleZh: 步态、平衡与红外热成像多模态整合增强膝骨关节炎的机器学习分类：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究发现，将步态、平衡和红外热成像数据进行多模态整合，能提升机器学习模型在膝骨关节炎（KOA）与健康对照组之间分类的准确性，优于单一领域模型。
items.curatedReasonEn: Integrating multimodal data from gait, balance, and infrared thermography into machine learning models improves the diagnostic classification accuracy for knee osteoarthritis. This suggests that in future KOA patient assessments, you might consider combining multi-dimensional biomechanical and physiological indicators for more precise diagnosis and treatment stratification.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法建立因果关系，且模型的外推性需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, which cannot establish causality, and the generalizability of the model requires further validation.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Identifying Gaps in Rehabilitation Strategies for Chronic Stroke: A Systematic Review of Evidence in Patients With and Without Nerve Transfer.
items.summary: A systematic review identified gaps in rehabilitation strategies for chronic stroke, particularly in the detailed comparison and description of rehabilitation protocols between contralateral C7 (CC7) nerve transfer and technology-assisted/high-dose rehabilitation approaches for upper limb impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述指出了慢性卒中患者上肢康复的证据空白，特别是在神经移植术后康复方案剂量、内容和交付模式方面。这提示你在设计方案或参与神经移植讨论时，需审慎评估现有证据并积极探索个性化方案。
items.titleZh: 慢性卒中康复策略中的差距识别：神经移植术患者与非神经移植术患者的证据系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述指出，在慢性卒中患者上肢功能障碍康复中，对侧C7神经移植与技术辅助/高剂量康复这两种路径的康复策略缺乏直接比较和详细描述，存在证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review highlights evidence gaps in upper limb rehabilitation for chronic stroke, especially regarding the dose, content, and delivery models of post-nerve transfer rehabilitation. This indicates you should critically evaluate existing evidence and proactively explore personalized treatment plans when designing protocols or engaging in nerve transfer discussions.
items.limitation: 该综述未提供具体纳入研究的详细康复方案描述，且未直接比较不同康复路径的效果。
items.limitationEn: The review did not provide detailed descriptions of rehabilitation protocols from included studies, nor did it directly compare the efficacy of different rehabilitation pathways.
items.journal: NeuroRehabilitation

items.title: CMS Modernizes Nursing Home Oversight with New Risk-Based Survey Approach Designed to Highlight High Performance, Encourage Improvement
items.summary: CMS is modernizing nursing home oversight with a new risk-based survey approach designed to identify high-performing facilities and encourage improvement in care.
items.curatedReason: CMS 正在推行养老院监管的新风险导向调查方法，旨在突出高性能机构并鼓励改进。虽然不是直接针对 PT 执业的政策，但你的机构如果服务老年康复，需关注这些监管导向，因为它们会影响你所在机构的整体评估和资源分配。
items.titleZh: CMS 采用新风险导向调查方法，实现养老院监管现代化，旨在突出高绩效、鼓励改进
items.summaryZh: 美国医疗保险和医疗补助服务中心（CMS）正通过新的风险导向调查方法，使养老院监管现代化，以识别高绩效机构并促进服务质量提升。
items.curatedReasonEn: CMS is implementing a new risk-based survey approach for nursing home oversight, aiming to highlight high-performing facilities and encourage improvement. While not directly targeting PT practice, if your facility provides geriatric rehabilitation services, you should monitor these regulatory directions as they will impact your facility's overall evaluation and resource allocation.

items.title: Task-Oriented training in a Patient with Triplegia: Post-Stroke Hemiparesis Complicating Pre-Existing Contralateral Upper Extremity Paralysis: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report demonstrates that task-oriented training facilitated functional independence in a 75-year-old man with triplegia post-stroke, showing Fugl-Meyer Assessment-UE scores improved from 3 to 43 by 23 weeks and remained 41 at 1 year.
items.curatedReason: 本病例报告展示了针对卒中后偏瘫合并对侧上肢瘫痪的患者，任务导向训练可促进功能独立性。这强调了定制化康复方案在复杂神经损伤患者中的潜在益处。
items.titleZh: 三肢瘫患者的任务导向训练：卒中后偏瘫合并对侧上肢既往瘫痪的病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一项病例报告显示，一名 75 岁卒中后偏瘫合并对侧上肢既往瘫痪的患者，通过任务导向训练，Fugl-Meyer 上肢评分在 23 周时从 3 分提高到 43 分，并在 1 年后维持在 41 分，提示功能独立性获得改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report highlights how task-oriented training can facilitate functional independence in patients with post-stroke hemiparesis complicated by pre-existing contralateral upper extremity paralysis, emphasizing the potential benefits of tailored rehabilitation programs in complex neurological cases.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，结论的外推性非常有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report, limiting the generalizability of its findings.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: The 2027 Proposed Rule is Out. Here's What You Need to Know.
items.summary: The 2027 Proposed Rule for Medicare in the US has been released, outlining key changes that physical therapists need to understand regarding reimbursement and practice guidelines.
items.curatedReason: 2027 年美国 Medicare 拟议规则通常涵盖了物理治疗服务的报销费率、支付政策和监管更新。仔细研读这些变化，尤其是在远程医疗、MIPS 绩效考核和执业范围方面的潜在调整，将直接影响你未来的执业收入和运营模式。
items.titleZh: 2027 年 Medicare 拟议规则出炉：你需要了解的要点
items.summaryZh: 美国 Medicare 2027 年拟议规则已发布，其中包含物理治疗师需了解的报销和执业指南的关键变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: The 2027 US Medicare proposed rule typically covers reimbursement rates, payment policies, and regulatory updates for physical therapy services. Thoroughly reviewing these changes, especially potential adjustments to telehealth, MIPS performance, and scope of practice, will directly impact your future practice revenue and operational model.

items.title: Retrospective analysis of the relationship between post-stroke fatigue and aphasia severity
items.summary: A retrospective analysis investigates the relationship between post-stroke fatigue, affecting 25-85% of survivors, and aphasia severity, noting that fatigue is a chronic condition not reliably predicted by stroke type or physical impairment.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后疲劳与失语症严重程度之间的关联可能有助于在早期识别高风险患者。在评估卒中康复患者时，除了传统运动和认知功能外，也要关注情绪、语言和疲劳症状的交叉影响。
items.titleZh: 卒中后疲劳与失语症严重程度关系的回顾性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性分析探讨了卒中后疲劳（影响 25-85% 的卒中幸存者）与失语症严重程度之间的关系，指出卒中后疲劳是慢性症状，并非由卒中类型或共存躯体障碍可靠预测。
items.curatedReasonEn: The potential link between post-stroke fatigue and aphasia severity can help identify high-risk patients earlier. When assessing stroke rehabilitation patients, consider the intersecting impact of emotional, language, and fatigue symptoms alongside traditional motor and cognitive functions.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性分析，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective analysis, this study cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: A Brazilian randomized controlled trial found that Pilates was more cost-effective than home-based exercises for chronic non-specific low back pain, with comparable clinical outcomes, in 145 participants aged 18-50.
items.curatedReason: 本项来自巴西的 RCT 发现，普拉提在治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益上，优于居家锻炼，并且在治疗效果上没有显著差异。在设计腰痛管理方案时，特别是要考虑经济因素时，可以优先考虑普拉提。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与居家锻炼治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益：一项基于试验的经济学评价。
items.summaryZh: 一项来自巴西的随机对照试验发现，在治疗慢性非特异性腰痛方面，普拉提（n=72）比居家锻炼（n=73）更具成本效益，且临床效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT from Brazil found Pilates to be more cost-effective than home-based exercises for chronic non-specific low back pain, with no significant difference in treatment outcomes. When designing low back pain management plans, especially with economic considerations, prioritize Pilates.
items.limitation: 本研究仅限于巴西人群，结果外推性需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This study was limited to the Brazilian population, so generalizability requires caution.
items.journal: BMC musculoskeletal disorders

items.title: Acute Modulation of Lumbar Motor Unit Behavior During Experimentally Induced Low Back Pain: A Motor Unit Decomposition Analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated the effects of experimentally induced acute low back pain on force steadiness and motor unit discharge characteristics during sustained spinal extension in 33 healthy participants, finding alterations in motor unit behavior.
items.curatedReason: 急性腰痛确实会立即改变运动单元的放电模式，这可能解释了患者的运动控制障碍。但这个样本量（33人）且是诱发性疼痛，我们需谨慎解读，不宜直接推断临床患者的长期表现。
items.titleZh: 实验诱导急性腰痛期间腰部运动单位行为的急性调节：一项运动单位分解分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究通过运动单位分解分析，探讨了在实验诱导的急性腰痛期间，腰部运动单位行为的急性调节，发现疼痛改变了运动单位放电特性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Acute low back pain immediately alters motor unit discharge patterns, which likely contributes to impaired motor control. However, given the small sample (33 participants) and experimentally induced pain, we should be cautious about directly extrapolating these findings to the long-term clinical presentation of patients.
items.limitation: 研究对象为健康人群的实验诱导性急性腰痛，结果可能无法完全代表临床真实世界的慢性腰痛患者。
items.limitationEn: The study involved experimentally induced acute low back pain in healthy participants, so results may not fully represent chronic low back pain in real-world clinical settings.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 36 studies (including 29 RCTs) on lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis, exploring the range, characteristics, and outcome measures of these conservative strategies.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了针对膝关节骨关节炎的生活方式干预措施。它能让你全面了解当前各种非药物治疗策略的类型和评估方法，辅助你为患者制定个性化治疗方案。
items.titleZh: 膝关节骨关节炎患者生活方式干预的探索性范围综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述探讨了膝关节骨关节炎患者生活方式干预措施的范围、特点和评估结果，共纳入36项研究（包括29项随机对照试验）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review synthesizes lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis. It offers a comprehensive overview of current non-pharmacological treatment strategies and assessment methods, aiding you in developing individualized treatment plans for your patients.
items.limitation: 范围综述不进行质量评估，因此无法对所纳入研究的证据强度做出判断。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews do not assess study quality, so the strength of evidence from included studies cannot be determined.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients in Nigeria assessed the prevalence, patterns, treatment outcomes, and costs of physiotherapy-managed musculoskeletal disorders, finding a mean age of 47.8 ± 25.7 years and predominantly female patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项来自尼日利亚的回顾性研究首次提供了该地区由物理治疗师管理的肌肉骨骼疾病的流行病学、治疗结果和成本数据。这对于了解不同医疗系统背景下物理治疗服务的需求和价值有重要参考意义。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗师管理肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗结果和成本。
items.summaryZh: 一项对尼日利亚1582名患者进行的10年回顾性研究评估了由物理治疗师管理的肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗效果和成本，发现平均年龄为47.8 ± 25.7岁，患者以女性为主。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study from Nigeria provides the first data on the epidemiology, treatment outcomes, and costs of musculoskeletal disorders managed by physical therapists in the region. This is highly relevant for understanding the demand and value of physical therapy services within diverse healthcare systems.
items.limitation: 作为回顾性研究，数据收集可能存在选择偏倚和信息不完整。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective study, data collection may be subject to selection bias and incomplete information.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigates the long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain, a condition affecting 3% to 4% of adults worldwide.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 为慢性外侧肘痛提供了新的微创干预选项。如果患者对传统保守治疗反应不佳，你可以考虑转诊或与团队讨论将超声引导经皮电神经刺激作为潜在治疗方案，但记住其长期效果仍需更多验证。
items.titleZh: 超声引导经皮电神经刺激治疗慢性外侧肘痛的长期疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验探讨了超声引导经皮电神经刺激治疗慢性外侧肘痛的长期疗效。慢性外侧肘痛影响全球约 3% 至 4% 的成年人。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT offers a new minimally invasive intervention for chronic lateral elbow pain. If patients respond poorly to traditional conservative treatments, you might consider referral or discuss ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation as a potential option, keeping in mind that its long-term efficacy needs further validation.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告样本量，且该技术依赖超声引导，对操作者的技能和设备有较高要求，可能影响其在普适临床实践中的可推广性。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report the sample size. Additionally, this technique relies on ultrasound guidance, requiring high operator skill and specialized equipment, which may limit its generalizability in widespread clinical practice.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

related.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial.

items.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy.
items.summary: This RCT (N=84) evaluated adherence to two pain threshold protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy, finding that consistent pain level differences were maintained between groups.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 84 人的 RCT 提示，在肩袖肌腱病患者 26 周的运动干预中，不同的疼痛阈值管理协议能持续维持疼痛水平差异，并影响患者依从性。这意味着我们在临床实践中，应根据患者具体情况精细化疼痛管理。
items.titleZh: 慢性肩袖肌腱病患者在包含疼痛阈值、运动和物理治疗的干预中的依从性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对慢性肩袖肌腱病患者的 RCT 研究（N=84）评估了 26 周运动干预中两种疼痛阈值协议的依从性，结果显示各组间疼痛水平差异保持一致。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT (N=84) suggests that different pain threshold management protocols can consistently maintain pain level differences and impact adherence in patients undergoing a 26-week exercise intervention for rotator cuff tendinopathy. This means we should refine pain management in clinical practice based on individual patient needs.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（N=84），可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size (N=84) may limit the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy

items.title: Physical therapy protocols for patients with a megaprosthesis after bone tumor resection.
items.summary: Consensus-based physical therapy protocols were developed and piloted for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection, providing evidence-based guidance for six different megaprosthesis types.
items.curatedReason: 针对骨肿瘤切除术后巨型假体置换患者的物理治疗方案发布。这些方案是基于文献探索和专家共识制定的，能为你这类特殊患者群体的康复提供结构化指导。
items.titleZh: 骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体置换患者的物理治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 针对骨肿瘤切除和巨型假体重建患者，通过文献探索和专家共识程序，制定并试点实施了六种不同巨型假体的物理治疗方案，旨在提供循证指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: Physical therapy protocols for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection have been published. These evidence-based and consensus-driven protocols offer structured guidance for rehabilitating this specific patient population.
items.limitation: 该协议是基于专家共识而非对照研究，其有效性尚需进一步的临床验证。
items.limitationEn: The protocol is based on expert consensus rather than controlled studies, and its efficacy requires further clinical validation.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: In safe hands - patients with knee and hip osteoarthritis expectations and experience of physical therapist-led triage in a secondary care setting.
items.summary: An explorative qualitative study found that while patients with hip or knee OA perceived PT-led triage as good quality, they reported lower participation in decision-making and less fulfillment of assessment expectations.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究提醒我们，尽管髋/膝关节骨关节炎患者普遍认为物理治疗师主导的分诊质量不错，但他们在决策参与度和评估期望满足度上感受较低。推行 PT 主导分诊时，务必提高患者在诊疗决策中的参与感，并明确评估范围，以避免期望落差。
items.titleZh: 膝髋骨关节炎患者对二级医疗机构物理治疗师主导分诊的期望与体验
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性定性研究发现，髋膝骨关节炎患者认为物理治疗师主导的分诊质量良好，但在决策参与度和评估期望满足度方面报告较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study highlights that while hip/knee OA patients generally perceive PT-led triage as high quality, they report lower participation in decision-making and less fulfillment of assessment expectations. When implementing PT-led triage, ensure patients feel more involved in treatment decisions and clearly define assessment scope to manage expectations.
items.limitation: 作为定性研究，其结果不具备普遍性，但为理解患者体验提供了深入的视角。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, its findings are not generalizable but offer in-depth insights into patient experiences.
items.journal: BMC musculoskeletal disorders

items.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort.
items.summary: Cross-sectional analysis of a population-based cohort (N=605) described the distribution and risk factors for sexual dysfunction during primary SCI rehabilitation, finding 67% reported at least one sexual dysfunction symptom.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项重要的横断面分析，对 605 名脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的数据显示，高达 67% 的人在早期康复期间报告至少一种性功能障碍症状。这些数据再次强调了在 SCI 康复初期，我们必须主动筛查和解决患者的性健康需求，将其纳入常规康复计划。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤早期康复期间的性功能：一项基于人群队列的描述性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项基于人群队列的横断面分析（N=605）描述了脊髓损伤早期康复期间性功能障碍的分布和风险因素，结果显示 67% 的患者报告至少一种性功能障碍症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: This crucial cross-sectional analysis of 605 SCI patients reveals that 67% reported at least one sexual dysfunction symptom during primary rehabilitation. These data re-emphasize that we must proactively screen for and address patients' sexual health needs in early SCI rehabilitation, integrating it into routine care plans.
items.limitation: 研究设计为横断面分析，无法建立因果关系，且数据可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional design prevents causal inference, and data may be subject to recall bias.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored eight physiotherapists' experiences treating children with cerebral palsy experiencing pain, identifying themes of facilitating wellbeing through bodily practice, embracing body experiences, and creating alliances based on safety, trust, and respect.
items.curatedReason: 这项对 8 名物理治疗师的定性研究揭示，治疗脑瘫儿童疼痛时，关键在于通过身体实践促进福祉、接纳身体体验，并建立基于安全、信任和尊重的同盟。作为治疗师，这提醒我们，处理这类复杂情况时，不仅要关注生理层面，更要注重情感连接和医患关系。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是为有意义的生活做贡献。”物理治疗师治疗患有疼痛的脑瘫儿童和青少年的经验——一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了八位物理治疗师在治疗患有疼痛的脑瘫儿童时的经验，研究发现通过身体治疗实践促进福祉，将身体体验作为理解和治疗疼痛的核心起点，以及基于安全、信任和尊重与儿童建立联盟是关键。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study with 8 physiotherapists reveals that treating pain in children with cerebral palsy is critical for facilitating well-being through bodily practice, embracing body experiences, and building alliances based on safety, trust, and respect. As therapists, this reminds us that in these complex cases, we must focus not only on the physiological but also on emotional connection and the patient-provider relationship.
items.limitation: 作为定性研究，样本量小（N=8），结果不具有普遍性，但能提供深层见解。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, the small sample size (N=8) limits generalizability but provides in-depth insights.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study (N=590) developed and validated a machine learning model to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using perioperative clinical parameters available at hospital discharge.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 590 人的回顾性队列研究开发并验证了一个机器学习模型，能利用出院时的围手术期临床参数，预测心血管手术后 3 个月的运动能力下降风险。这个模型为我们早期识别高风险患者、从而更精准地调整康复计划提供了重要工具。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期的运动不耐受
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究（N=590）开发并验证了一个机器学习模型，利用出院时可用的围手术期临床参数，预测心血管手术后 3 个月的运动能力下降。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study (N=590) developed and validated a machine learning model that can predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using perioperative clinical parameters available at hospital discharge. This model provides an important tool for early identification of high-risk patients, allowing us to more precisely tailor rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 该模型是在单中心数据上开发和验证的，其在不同医疗环境中的外部有效性尚需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: The model was developed and validated on single-center data, and its external validity in different healthcare settings requires further verification.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters

items.title: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study found that an advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy model resulted in a 70.9% plan-of-care completion rate (exceeding national benchmarks of 43%), with 96% of completers achieving Minimal Clinically Important Differences.
items.curatedReason: 远程物理治疗模型在新技术辅助下，有望显著提升患者依从性和临床结局。本研究显示，先进虚拟 PT 模型能将依从率提升近 30 个百分点，并让绝大多数患者达到最小临床重要差异。在考虑远程 PT 时，请关注这类集成技术的模型。
items.titleZh: 先进骨科虚拟物理治疗模型的患者参与度、临床结局与满意度：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究显示，先进的骨科虚拟物理治疗模型实现了 70.9% 的治疗方案完成率（高于全国基准的 43%），其中 96% 的完成者达到了最小临床重要差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Advanced virtual physical therapy models show promise in significantly improving patient adherence and clinical outcomes. This study demonstrates an advanced virtual PT model can boost adherence by nearly 30 percentage points, with most patients achieving Minimal Clinically Important Differences. When considering telehealth PT, prioritize models integrating such advanced technologies.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，且未设对照组，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study without a control group, which may introduce selection bias and confounding factors.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS) Application in Neurorehabilitation: A Beginner’s Guide for Clinicians
items.summary: This clinician's guide outlines transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS) as a noninvasive brain stimulation technique that modulates brain excitability at subthreshold levels, highlighting its low cost (often <$1k) and ease of integration with rehabilitation therapy.
items.curatedReason: 经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）作为一种经济且易于整合的非侵入性脑刺激技术，正被越来越多地应用于神经康复。这份“初学者指南”为你提供了 tDCS 的基本原理、操作细节和临床考量，帮助你了解是否适合将其引入你的实践。
items.titleZh: 经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）在神经康复中的应用：临床医生初学者指南
items.summaryZh: 这份临床医生指南介绍了经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）作为一种非侵入性脑刺激技术，它在阈下水平调节大脑兴奋性，并强调了其低成本（通常低于 1000 美元）和易于与康复治疗结合的优势。
items.curatedReasonEn: Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS) is a low-cost, easily integrated neurorehabilitation technique. This guide explains its principles and clinical applications, helping you decide whether to explore its integration into your practice.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Telerehabilitation during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified and mapped telerehabilitation intervention models, outcome domains, and evidence gaps for stroke survivors during the hospital-to-home transition, based on searches from 2000 onward.
items.curatedReason: 卒中患者出院到居家过渡期的远程康复需求明确。这份范围综述能帮你快速了解当前介入模型、关注的结局指标和现存证据空白，为开展服务或设计研究提供线索。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者出院到居家过渡期的远程康复：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述旨在识别和映射 2000 年以来卒中幸存者出院到居家过渡期远程康复的干预模型、结局领域和证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: The need for telerehabilitation during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors is clear. This scoping review provides a quick overview of current intervention models, outcome domains, and existing evidence gaps, offering insights for service implementation or research design.
items.limitation: 范围综述旨在识别和映射现有研究，不进行质量评估或综合证据以得出明确结论。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews aim to identify and map existing research, not to assess quality or synthesize evidence for definitive conclusions.
items.journal: Clinical rehabilitation

items.title: Profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain: A cross-sectional study.
items.summary: A multicentre cross-sectional study in Spain characterized the demographic, clinical, and healthcare utilization profiles of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics for vertigo, dizziness, or unsteadiness.
items.curatedReason: 这份西班牙前瞻性研究勾勒了私人诊所前庭康复患者的画像。可以与你的患者群特征对比，了解地区间转诊模式和临床需求的异同。
items.titleZh: 西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者画像：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在西班牙进行的多中心横断面研究，旨在描述到私人前庭物理治疗诊所就诊的眩晕、头晕或不稳定患者的人口统计学、临床和医疗利用特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Spanish prospective study outlines the profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics. You can compare it with your patient population to understand similarities and differences in referral patterns and clinical needs across regions.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，仅能提供相关性信息，无法建立因果关系，且可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey can only provide correlational information and cannot establish causality, and may be subject to recall bias.
items.journal: Physiotherapy

items.title: Impact of lower limb proprioception on balance and gait in hemiparetic patients: biomechanical analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated associations between lower extremity proprioceptive impairments (foot sole sensation, position sense, kinesthesia) and objective balance/gait measures in hemiparetic stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 明确下肢本体感觉障碍与偏瘫患者平衡和步态的具体关系，提示你在评估时要警惕本体感觉的缺失，并可能指导你将本体感觉训练纳入干预方案。
items.titleZh: 下肢本体感觉对偏瘫患者平衡和步态的影响：生物力学分析
items.summaryZh: 本研究调查了偏瘫卒中患者下肢本体感觉障碍（足底感觉、位置觉和运动觉）与客观平衡和步态测量之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Clarifying the specific relationship between lower limb proprioceptive deficits and balance/gait in hemiparetic patients suggests you should be vigilant about proprioceptive loss during assessment and consider incorporating proprioceptive training into interventions.
items.limitation: 研究未明确样本量，且为横断面设计，无法推断本体感觉障碍与平衡/步态之间的因果关系或干预效果。
items.limitationEn: The study does not specify sample size and, being a cross-sectional design, cannot infer causality or intervention effects between proprioceptive impairment and balance/gait.
items.journal: Gait & posture

items.title: Effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters in stroke patients: A within-subject repeated-measures study.
items.summary: A within-subject repeated-measures study with 27 stroke patients found that spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions differentially affected spatiotemporal gait parameters compared to a no-prioritization condition.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示，对卒中患者的步态训练，区分“空间优先”和“时间优先”的语言指令，可能影响步态参数改善。在你的临床实践中，可以尝试调整语言指令的侧重，观察患者反应。
items.titleZh: 空间和时间优先口头指令对卒中患者时空步态参数的影响：一项自身重复测量研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 27 名卒中患者进行的自身重复测量研究发现，空间和时间优先的口头指令与无优先指令相比，对时空步态参数产生了不同的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that for gait training in stroke patients, distinguishing between “spatial prioritization” and “temporal prioritization” verbal instructions may influence gait parameter improvements. In your clinical practice, try adjusting the emphasis of verbal instructions and observe patient responses.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本（27 例卒中患者）的自身前后对照研究，外推性有限，且长期效果未知。
items.limitationEn: This is a within-subject repeated-measures study with a small sample size (27 stroke patients), limiting generalizability and leaving long-term effects unknown.
items.journal: Physiotherapy theory and practice

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This study compared triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals after ACL reconstruction and healthy controls, also examining bilateral differences within the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后单腿跳跃任务中，三头肌的神经肌肉活动可能存在差异。这提示你在康复评估和训练中，别忽视足三头肌在重返运动中的作用，要系统评估并强化其功能。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中足三头肌神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 本研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术后个体与健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中足三头肌的肌电活动，并探讨了 ACLR 组内的双侧差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Neuromuscular activity of the triceps surae during single-leg jumping tasks may differ after ACL reconstruction. This suggests you should not overlook the role of the triceps surae in return-to-sport rehabilitation; systematically assess and strengthen its function.
items.limitation: 研究设计为对照研究，但未明确样本量，且 EMG 结果的临床意义需结合其他功能评估。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a controlled study, but the sample size is not specified, and the clinical significance of EMG results needs to be combined with other functional assessments.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Individual Prognostication of Emergence from Post-Traumatic Amnesia: A Nationwide Cohort Study
items.summary: A nationwide cohort study aimed to predict individual emergence from post-traumatic amnesia (PTA) in patients with moderate to severe traumatic brain injury (TBI).
items.curatedReason: 预测创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者从创伤后遗忘症（PTA）中恢复的时间点，这项队列研究提示了更精准的预后判断方式，有助于优化康复计划和管理患者预期。
items.titleZh: 创伤后遗忘症恢复的个体预后：一项全国性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项全国性队列研究旨在预测中度至重度创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者创伤后遗忘症（PTA）恢复的个体情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: Predicting the timing of emergence from post-traumatic amnesia (PTA) in TBI patients, this cohort study suggests a more precise prognostic approach, aiding in optimizing rehabilitation plans and managing patient expectations.
items.limitation: 研究设计为队列研究，可能存在混杂因素，且未明确预测模型的具体表现（如敏感性、特异性）。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a cohort study, which may have confounding factors, and the specific performance of the predictive model (e.g., sensitivity, specificity) is not explicitly stated.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Assessment and Management Practices for Post-Stroke Shoulder Pain Among Rehabilitation Professionals in Vietnam: A Cross-Sectional Survey.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey in Vietnam identified variations in assessment and management practices for post-stroke shoulder pain among rehabilitation professionals, highlighting potential evidence-practice gaps and barriers to effective care in lower- and middle-income countries.
items.curatedReason: 本项调查描绘了越南卒中后肩痛的评估与管理现状，提示当地康复专业人员的实践可能与循证指南存在差异。虽然不直接改变你的临床决策，但为了解全球实践差距提供了一个侧面视角。
items.titleZh: 越南康复专业人员卒中后肩痛评估与管理实践：一项横断面调查
items.summaryZh: 一项在越南进行的横断面调查发现，当地康复专业人员在卒中后肩痛的评估和管理实践上存在差异，揭示了中低收入国家在循证实践与有效护理方面的潜在差距和障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study from Vietnam suggests variations in assessment and management practices for post-stroke shoulder pain, possibly indicating evidence-practice gaps. It highlights potential challenges in rehabilitation practices within lower- and middle-income countries.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，仅反映特定时期的实践，无法揭示实践变化趋势或因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional survey, this study only reflects practices at a specific time and cannot reveal trends in practice changes or causal relationships.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An RCT of 24 male athletes post-ACLR showed that 8 weeks of visual perturbation training significantly improved lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors during unanticipated cutting maneuvers compared to conventional training, enhancing neuromuscular control.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后患者的视觉干扰训练可能改善非预期变向切割动作的下肢生物力学。这提示在重返运动训练中加入此类认知运动双重任务训练，能更全面地解决神经肌肉缺陷，有效降低再次损伤风险。这是功能性重返运动训练的重要进步。
items.titleZh: 视觉干扰训练对前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员非预期变向切割下肢生物力学和错误的影响：一项随机对照临床试验（RCT）
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 24 名 ACLR 术后男性运动员的随机对照试验（RCT）显示，8 周的视觉干扰训练显著改善了非预期变向切割动作中的下肢生物力学并减少了错误，增强了神经肌肉控制。
items.curatedReasonEn: Visual perturbation training might improve lower-limb biomechanics during unanticipated cutting maneuvers in athletes post-ACL reconstruction. This suggests that incorporating such cognitive-motor dual-task training into return-to-sport protocols can more comprehensively address neuromuscular deficits and effectively reduce re-injury risk. This is a significant advancement in functional return-to-sport training.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（24 名运动员），且仅针对男性运动员，结果的普遍性需更多研究验证。
items.limitationEn: The study involved a small sample size (24 athletes) and was limited to male athletes, so the generalizability of its findings requires further validation.
items.journal: BMC musculoskeletal disorders

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of physical therapists identified factors influencing clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients following anterior cruciate ligament injury, indicating varying application practices.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查揭示了物理治疗师在 ACL 损伤后对儿科和青少年患者进行血流限制训练（BFRT）的决策因素。这提示你在考虑将 BFRT 用于青少年时，除了关注研究证据，还要理解临床实践中权衡的患者特征，以确保安全有效。
items.titleZh: 影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿科和青少年患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 一项针对物理治疗师的横断面调查确定了影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿科和青少年患者血流限制训练（BFRT）临床决策的因素，表明存在不同的应用实践。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey reveals the factors influencing physical therapists' decision-making regarding blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients post-ACL injury. This suggests that when considering BFRT for adolescents, in addition to research evidence, you should understand the patient characteristics weighed in clinical practice to ensure safety and effectiveness.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，依赖物理治疗师的自报，可能存在报告偏倚，且无法揭示决策因素与 BFRT 疗效的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey relies on self-reported data from physical therapists, which may introduce reporting bias and cannot establish a causal link between decision factors and BFRT efficacy.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: A single-blind RCT of 28 recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability found that both Dynamic Taping and Sports Taping produced immediate, comparable improvements in dynamic balance and proprioception.
items.curatedReason: 动态贴扎（DT）和运动贴扎（ST）对慢性踝关节不稳（CAI）患者的动态平衡和本体感觉有即时效应。尽管 DT 宣称不限制运动，但本研究显示与 ST 效果相似。这意味着 DT 并非绝对优势，选择贴扎类型仍需结合患者具体需求和临床经验。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 28 名慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员的单盲随机对照试验发现，动态贴扎和运动贴扎均能立即、可比地改善动态平衡和本体感觉。
items.curatedReasonEn: Dynamic Taping (DT) and Sports Taping (ST) show immediate effects on dynamic balance and proprioception in patients with Chronic Ankle Instability (CAI). Although DT claims not to restrict movement, this study indicates similar effects to ST. This implies DT is not definitively superior, and the choice of taping should still integrate patient-specific needs and clinical experience.
items.limitation: 研究样本量小（28 名参与者），且仅评估了贴扎的即时效果，长期效果和临床意义尚待进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (28 participants) and only assessed the immediate effects of taping; long-term effects and clinical significance require further investigation.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy
